name: Beit Handesai
message: Beit Handesai ,in Hebrew "בית ההנדסאי" , the engineering company in Israel attacked by Malek team 🔥 based on this successful cyber attack, we have the information of more than 60,000 persons and companions ☠️ information includes: ☠️documents including:🩸 names & identity numbers,🩸 contact numbers and emails,🩸 phones & home addresses🩸 PDFs of passports️🩸 & etc ...🧨⚠️and we destroyed all data⚠️🧨 MALEK TEAM has everything 🔪🩸
